gripper_p2_21.source_text: Given parameter X of PDDL type object, parameter Y of PDDL type object, and parameter Z of PDDL type object, where X differs from Y, X differs from Z, and Y differs from Z, ensure that predicate at holds for arguments X and Y at every state before the first state where predicate carry holds for arguments X and Z.

gripper_p2_22.source_text: Given parameter X of PDDL type object and parameter Y of PDDL type object, where X differs from Y, ensure that at some state, predicate at-robby holds for argument X, while predicate at-robby does not hold for argument Y.

gripper_p2_23.source_text: Given parameter X of PDDL type object, parameter Y of PDDL type object, parameter Z of PDDL type object, parameter A of PDDL type object, and parameter B of PDDL type object, where X differs from Y, X differs from Z, X differs from A, X differs from B, Y differs from Z, Y differs from A, Y differs from B, Z differs from A, Z differs from B, and A differs from B, ensure that at some state, predicate carry holds for arguments X and Y; at a strictly later state, predicate carry holds for arguments Z and A; and at a strictly later state after that, predicate at-robby holds for argument B.

gripper_p2_24.source_text: Given parameter X of PDDL type object, parameter Y of PDDL type object, and parameter Z of PDDL type object, where X differs from Y, X differs from Z, and Y differs from Z, ensure that at some state, predicate carry holds for arguments X and Y, and at a strictly later state, predicate at-robby holds for argument Z.

gripper_p2_25.source_text: Given parameter X of PDDL type object and parameter Y of PDDL type object, where X differs from Y, ensure that predicate at-robby holds for argument X at every state before the first state where predicate at-robby holds for argument Y.

gripper_p2_26.source_text: Given parameter X of PDDL type object, parameter Y of PDDL type object, parameter Z of PDDL type object, and parameter A of PDDL type object, where X differs from Y, X differs from Z, X differs from A, Y differs from Z, Y differs from A, and Z differs from A, ensure that at some state, predicate carry holds for arguments X and Y; at a strictly later state, predicate carry holds for arguments Z and A; and at a strictly later state after that, predicate free holds for argument Y.

gripper_p2_27.source_text: Given parameter X of PDDL type object and parameter Y of PDDL type object, where X differs from Y, ensure that at some state, predicate carry holds for arguments X and Y, while predicate free does not hold for argument Y.

gripper_p2_28.source_text: Given parameter X of PDDL type object, parameter Y of PDDL type object, parameter Z of PDDL type object, and parameter A of PDDL type object, where X differs from Y, X differs from Z, X differs from A, Y differs from Z, Y differs from A, and Z differs from A, ensure that at some state, predicate carry holds for arguments X and Y, and at a strictly later state, predicate carry holds for arguments Z and A.

gripper_p2_29.source_text: Given parameter X of PDDL type object, parameter Y of PDDL type object, and parameter Z of PDDL type object, where X differs from Y, X differs from Z, and Y differs from Z, ensure that predicate at holds for arguments X and Y at every state before the first state where predicate at-robby holds for argument Z.

gripper_p2_30.source_text: Given parameter X of PDDL type object, parameter Y of PDDL type object, parameter Z of PDDL type object, parameter A of PDDL type object, and parameter B of PDDL type object, where X differs from Y, X differs from Z, X differs from A, X differs from B, Y differs from Z, Y differs from A, Y differs from B, Z differs from A, Z differs from B, and A differs from B, ensure that at some state, predicate carry holds for arguments X and Y; at a strictly later state, predicate carry holds for arguments Z and A; and at a strictly later state after that, predicate at holds for arguments X and B.
